## Diagram 2

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class ExternalStateEnum {
        <<enumeration>>
        NOT_BUILT : "Not Built"
        PENDING_SHIPMENT : "Pending Shipment"
        PENDING_UPFIT : "Pending Upfit"
        SHIPPABLE : "Shippable"
        NON_SHIPPABLE : "Non-Shippable"
    }
```
